## Summary

Describe the change and the workflow it affects.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Security/access control
- [ ] Grant evidence/verification
- [ ] Test/CI

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## Grant workflow impact

- [ ] Discovery
- [ ] Assessment
- [ ] Pipeline
- [ ] Co-Pilot drafting
- [ ] Pack export
- [ ] Admin/workspace management
- [ ] No workflow impact

## Security and data boundary review

- [ ] No sensitive data added to public surfaces
- [ ] Auth/role behavior reviewed
- [ ] LLM prompt data boundary reviewed
- [ ] Source evidence behavior reviewed

## Reviewer notes

List anything reviewers should verify manually.
